changeSet.author: microfina-phase12
changeSet.sql: IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'COMPLETUDE_DOSSIER') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('COMPLETUDE_DOSSIER', 'Valider la complétude documentaire d''un dossier de crédit', 'CREDIT', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'ANALYSE_FINANCIERE') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('ANALYSE_FINANCIERE', 'Saisir / soumettre une analyse financière', 'CREDIT', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'VISA_RC') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('VISA_RC', 'Visa du Responsable Crédit sur un dossier', 'CREDIT', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'COMITE_CREDIT') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('COMITE_CREDIT', 'Décision du comité de crédit (approbation / rejet)', 'CREDIT', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'VISA_SF') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('VISA_SF', 'Visa du Service Financier (autorisation de déblocage)', 'CREDIT', 0)

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege = 'DEBLOQUER_CREDIT') INSERT INTO Privilege (code_privilege, libelle, module, version) VALUES ('DEBLOQUER_CREDIT', 'Procéder au déblocage effectif (caisse / chèque / virement)', 'CREDIT', 0)

rollback.sql: DELETE FROM Privilege WHERE code_privilege IN ( 'COMPLETUDE_DOSSIER', 'ANALYSE_FINANCIERE', 'VISA_RC', 'COMITE_CREDIT', 'VISA_SF', 'DEBLOQUER_CREDIT' )
